---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new section, example, pattern, or improvement to the framework
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature or addition you are requesting.

## Problem / Motivation

What gap does this address? Why is this needed in the framework?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the content, structure, or addition you have in mind.

- Suggested file path: `docs/...` or `examples/...`
- Suggested format: (markdown doc / example file / diagram)

## Alternatives Considered

Are there existing docs or patterns that partially address this? What's missing?

## Additional Context

Links, references, or examples from other frameworks that may be relevant.
